summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Kit.com integration and Lead Magnet features. All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend UI components functional with minor Kit.com connection banner issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Kit.com connection banner not showing on Campaigns tab despite successful API connection

passed_tests: Landing page loads with 'Free Guide' navigation
Lead magnet banner with purple gradient displays correctly
Lead magnet modal opens and form submission works
Kit.com account API returns connected status
Kit.com forms API returns data (0 forms found)
Kit.com tags API returns data (0 tags found)
Lead magnet subscription API works correctly
Lead magnet subscribers API returns data
Campaigns page tabs (Campaigns, Kit.com Integration, Lead Magnet Subscribers) all functional
Lead Magnet Subscribers table shows 2 entries with proper data
Kit.com Integration tab shows Account, Forms, and Tags cards
All backend CRUD operations working (22/22 tests passed)
AI features (lead scoring, email drafting) working

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (1 minor UI issue out of 20+ features tested)

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Kit.com connection banner display on Campaigns tab - banner should show 'Connected to Kit.com' when Kit.com API is working
